name: Zanvyl Krieger School of Arts and Sciences
strategic_fit_advice: Ideal for pre-med, humanities, natural sciences, and social sciences students. Very flexible, allowing students to design their own pathways or double-major easily.
student_archetype: Intellectually curious, interdisciplinary thinker, strong writer and researcher.

majors.name: Neuroscience

core_courses: AS.200.141 Foundations of Brain, Behavior and Cognition
AS.080.305 Neuroscience: Cellular and Systems I
AS.080.306 Neuroscience: Cellular and Systems II

majors.notes: One of the most popular pre-med majors at JHU. Students select a focus area: cellular/molecular, cognitive, computational, or systems neuroscience.
